PreToolUse.description: Log the tool usage to a file for auditing purposes.
Suggest strategic compaction after tool usage.

PostToolUse.description: Run quality gate checks after tool usage.

SessionStart.description: Log the session start to a file for auditing purposes.
Provide useful memory for agents, such as relevant documentation files in the repository and the latest session information.

Stop.description: Log the session end to a file for auditing purposes.
